top_signals.title: Xi Urges Chinese Authorities to Curb Accidents After Mine Blast
top_signals.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping urged authorities nationwide to step up efforts to curb major industrial accidents following a deadly gas explosion at a coal mine in northern Shanxi province, underscoring persistent safety risks in mining and heavy industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Canadian steel sector faces deeper pain than aluminum as tariff uncertainty clouds outlook
top_signals.summary: Federal support package seen as short-term relief while industry braces for prolonged trade disruption.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: OKX, ICE partner on oil perps as NYSE-parent pressures US regulators to rein in Hyperliquid
top_signals.summary: OKX's oil perps contracts will track Intercontinental Exchange's Brent Crude and WTI Crude energy benchmarks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Collahuasi permit setback jolts Chile copper sector
top_signals.summary: Anglo American and Glencore face renewed delays as Chile reopens review of a major desalination project at the copper mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
